title: budget tracker web app (node-web, 5-unit fan-in) — the Stage-2 demo
run_budget_note: #740 re-grain 2026-07-08 (LA-directed): B3's first campaign run measured node/web tasks at 40-85 min EACH (5 tasks + gates + acceptance ~4.5-6.5 h), STALLED on the 3 h default. 6 h envelope over the measured worst case; per-card so the default stays tight for every other job. Not a shrink of the card (that would change the Stage-2 demo it measures).
goal: I want a simple page I can open in my web browser to keep track of my budget. It needs somewhere to remember my entries between visits, a way for me to add an expense with an amount and a category, a running total that updates as I add things, a view of my spending grouped by category so I can see where the money goes, and one main page that brings all of that together so I can actually use it day to day.

expected_outcome.notes: Doubles as Stage-2, the demo the operator watches (plan §3.2). Exercises the W4 node job-oracle generalization (node:test over .mjs modules) + the visual tier: visual criteria render STATUS_EYEBALL / UNVERIFIED-until-eyeball, never auto-passed. GREEN is judged on the objective tiers only; the eyeball tier is handed to the operator explicitly.
